narrative:
Liberty  Twp township has 2,100 registered voters, with 47.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.5 percentage points.
